globalNews.title: Vance says Iran will allow nuclear inspectors back into the country
globalNews.summary: The US vice-president says a great deal of progress has been made after the first round of talks between the US and Iran.

globalNews.title: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
globalNews.summary: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.

globalNews.title: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
globalNews.summary: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.

globalNews.title: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
globalNews.summary: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.

globalNews.title: Clive Davis, music mogul behind Whitney Houston and Bruce Springsteen, dies aged 94
globalNews.summary: The record company executive also worked with Billy Joel, Pink Floyd, Alicia Keys and Aerosmith.

cryptoNews.title: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange
cryptoNews.summary: The venture is subject to regulatory approvals but will be co-chaired by ICE and former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who began working with OKX in 2023.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin weekly close above $63K amid RSI divergence may be bottom signal: Data
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin's repeated weekly candle close above $63,000 align with signals that may mark a market bottom.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price taps $65.5K as Iran deal sees oil drop toward 16-week low
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin sought a breakout toward a potential BTC price target near $70,000 as Iran news sent oil toward its lowest levels since early March.

cryptoNews.title: Why Google search can be a crypto wallet risk
cryptoNews.summary: Think your wallet is safe? A major crypto risk may start with a Google search and one wrong click.

cryptoNews.title: Enso launches RWA app and trading for over 500 tokenized assets
cryptoNews.summary: Enso launched access to over 500 tokenized assets and US stocks, citing a growing demand for US equity exposure among European investors.

aiNews.title: SpaceX inks compute deal with Reflection AI, an open-source AI lab

aiNews.title: The founder conference built for growth: TechCrunch Founder Summit pass rates increase June 26
aiNews.summary: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 by June 26, 11:59 p.m. PT. Designed for founders first on November 4 in Boston. Register today.

aiNews.title: When the Trump administration cracks down on Anthropic, who benefits?
aiNews.summary: On the new episode of Equity, we discussed what actually prompted the administration's latest moves against Anthropic, and what this might mean for the AI ecosystem.

aiNews.title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27

aiNews.title: Signal’s Meredith Whittaker wants you to remember that AI chatbots ‘are not your friends’
aiNews.summary: "These are not your friends. These are not conscious beings. These are not sentient interlocutors.”
